what: Present file/folder picker for the user to select Markdown sources to import
why: The user must choose which .md files or folder to import into the vault

actions.label: Select files
actions.triggers: Tauri open() with text file filter (md, txt, rst, mdx, markdown), multiple=true

success_handling.criteria: User selects at least one text file or a folder containing text files

error_handling.description: User dismissed the file picker without selecting — stay on current step
User confirmed the picker but no files matched the .md filter

decisions.rationale: Users may want to pick individual files or an entire folder — both are valid import sources
